name: Sarquiss
description:
__Height:__ 228 cm (7'6")
__Affiliations:__ Bellamy Pirates

The First Mate of Bellamy the Hyena. He is nick-named 'Big Knife', due to his large dagger (it bears a strong resemblance to a massive kukri). Just like his captain, he strongly believes that a New Age is coming and laughs at anyone who mentions their dreams. He also falsely believes that a bounty serves as a rating of a person's fighting level, making him believe himself to be a more powerful fighter than he truly is.
